_handAuthored: Not bytes the source served: a staged edge state, hand-built from schedule.json (the real capture of the same date) by replacing its harvested records with the absent anchor. Carries the ADR-0005 provenance header even so.
_note: fetch could not locate the schedule state — the app did not hydrate, a redesign moved it, or the page is not ours. The JSON equivalent of SCC's missing <table>: the anchor is absent, so parse returns ok:false rather than reading it as a quiet week.
